name: team-worklog-app
description: A deployable task and work-log management app with React, Express, and SQLite.

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: npm run seed && npm run build && npm start
scripts.dev:split: npm run seed && concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: npm run seed && npm start --prefix server
